placeholder.plan: 계획할 내용을 입력하세요 — 파일은 변경되지 않습니다

command.chipTitle: 이 명령을 실행합니다 — 인자를 입력하거나 Backspace를 눌러 이름을 수정하세요

plan.label: 계획
plan.description: 읽기 전용: 조사 후 계획을 먼저 작성

approve.label: 직접 승인
approve.description: 삭제, 설치, 원격 연결 전에 확인을 요청합니다

localCommand.cleared: 채팅 컨텍스트를 지웠습니다. 파일은 같은 폴더에 남아 있습니다.

starters.heading: 무엇을 살펴볼까요?
starters.subheading: 아래에 분석 내용을 설명하거나, 다음 중 하나로 시작해 보세요.

demo.title: 데모 분석을 처음부터 끝까지 실행
demo.description: 데이터셋을 시뮬레이션하고, 모델을 적합시키고, 그림과 추적 가능한 리포트를 생성합니다.

analyze.title: 내 데이터 분석
analyze.description: 추가한 파일을 에이전트에게 지정하면 그림과 리포트를 받을 수 있습니다.

audit.title: 리포트 추적성 감사
audit.description: 인용, 출처 없는 수치, 그림과 코드 간 일치 여부를 확인합니다.

example-shampoo.title: Explore an example: shampoo formulation
example-shampoo.description: Cost-optimize a surfactant blend to a target active content, then write a report.

runtime.title: OpenCode 런타임
runtime.bodyPrefix: 데스크톱 앱은 내장된 OpenCode를 자동으로 실행합니다. 브라우저에서는 다음으로 시작하세요

filesToggle.title: 대화 옆에서 이 세션의 폴더 탐색

runsToggle.label: 실행
runsToggle.title: 이 세션의 실험 실행 — 대화 옆에 표시

notebook.openTitle: {{path}} 열기 — 에이전트가 이 세션에서 이 노트북을 작업합니다

status.paused: 일시 중지됨 — 에이전트가 아래에서 사용자의 응답을 기다리고 있습니다

thread.sampleNotice: 이것은 샘플 세션입니다. 실제로 대화하려면 실시간 에이전트 세션을 시작하세요.

workspaceChip.titleUnpinned: 새 날짜별 폴더에서 시작 ({{name}}) — 클릭하여 다른 폴더 선택

studio.heading: What do you want to formulate?
studio.subheading: Describe a product. FormuLab reads open-access literature and proposes an evidence-based, cost-optimized candidate formula.

target.label: Target product
target.placeholder: e.g. a sulfate-free gentle shampoo · an anti-limescale bathroom spray · a whitening toothpaste

materials.label: On-hand raw materials (optional)
materials.placeholder: One per line: name, price/kg, active%   e.g.  SLES, 1.4, 70

studio.disclaimer: Candidate only — not a validated recipe. Requires lab validation and regulatory review. Hazardous or illicit targets are refused.

result.heading: Formulation card
result.connect: Connect the runtime to generate a formulation.
result.working: Working — reading the literature and drafting your formulation. This can take a few minutes.
result.empty: Describe a product on the left and press Generate. The formulation card will appear here.
result.needKey: 왼쪽에서 API 키를 추가한 다음 생성하세요.
result.printTitle: 이 배합 카드를 인쇄합니다 (프린터 선택 또는 PDF로 인쇄)
result.humanReviewTitle: Human review required before this can proceed

costing.title: 원가
costing.partial: 이 합계는 배합의 {{pct}}%를 반영합니다. 가격 없음: {{list}}.
costing.needMaterials: 설정 → 일반에서 원료 가격표를 가져오면 원가를 계산할 수 있습니다.

builder.empty: 원료가 없습니다. 행을 추가하거나 생성된 카드를 편집하세요.
builder.noProjects: No formulation projects yet. Create one to start building a formula.
builder.projectCodeHint: The handle a batch record and an ERP row will use.
builder.templateDisclaimer: Structural template only. No percentages are supplied and nothing here is production approved.
builder.targetSkusHint: Pack size does not change the chemistry; it changes the packaging cost.
builder.claimsHint: One per line. Aspirational until tested.
builder.searchMaterials: Search materials by code, name, INCI or CAS
builder.costBasisTitle: Sum of the lines that carry a price. A trailing + means some lines have none.
builder.pinQs: Freeze this line at its current percentage
builder.groupIncompleteTitle: {{pct}}% of this group has no declared active matter, so the figure is a lower bound.
builder.autosaveTitle: Autosave writes the working draft. Versions are saved deliberately.
builder.changeReasonPlaceholder: e.g. reduce SLES to cut cost
builder.immutableNote: A saved version is never edited. Later changes create a new version that records this one as its parent.
builder.noVersions: No versions saved yet. Save one from the builder.
builder.restoreTitle: Load this version into a new working draft. The version itself is unchanged.

lifecycle.notAllowed: That status change is not allowed from here.

variant.hint: Starts a new draft from this version. Saving it records this name as the variant's branch, and the parent relationship is kept.

packaging.description: The packaging BOM(s) linked to this project's target SKUs. Edited from Administration, not here.
packaging.noSkus: This project has no target packaging SKUs yet.
packaging.noBom: No packaging BOM recorded for this SKU yet.

builder.standaloneOptimizerHint: Looking for the standalone what-if cost calculator (not tied to a project)?

compare.needTwo: Save at least two versions to compare them.
compare.author: Author

cost.snapshotTitle: Freeze this calculation against the current version
cost.needVersion: Save a formula version first; a snapshot has to point at one.
cost.noSnapshots: No cost snapshots saved for this project.

materials.appendOnlyNote: These records are append-only. A past cost snapshot points at them, so they are superseded rather than edited.
materials.name: Name
materials.ratesNote: Rates are entered or imported by a person. FormuLab never fetches one on its own, and every cost shows the rate it used.
materials.activeHint: Leave blank if unknown. A blank is reported as unknown, never counted as zero.
materials.densityHint: kg per litre. Needed to cost a volume fill.
materials.technicalMaxHint: Above this the material does not work, whatever a specification says.
materials.functionsHint: A material can hold several roles.
materials.hazardsHint: Recorded verbatim from the SDS. Never inferred.
materials.supplierHint: {{count}} supplier(s) on record. Link them through the supplier import.
materials.deactivateHint: Deactivate rather than delete: existing formulas and cost snapshots still reference this material.
materials.partialImport: Import the {{good}} valid row(s) and skip the {{bad}} that failed
materials.fileUnreadable: This file could not be read. It may be corrupted, password-protected, or not a valid CSV/.xlsx file.

compatibility.needVersion: Save a version first to attach a compatibility snapshot to it.
compatibility.snapshotTitle: Save the current findings as an immutable snapshot on this version
compatibility.dataIncompleteCount: {{count}} finding(s) could not be confirmed — data missing
compatibility.empty: No compatibility findings for the current formula and rule set.

safety.humanReviewRequired: This classification requires a named human to review and acknowledge before the formula can be approved.
safety.snapshotTitle: Save the current findings as an immutable snapshot on this version
safety.empty: No safety findings for the current formula and rule set.
safety.resolutionKindChanged: Formula changed to remove the issue

ruleManager.invalidShape: Every rule needs at least an id, a name and conditions.
ruleManager.title: Rule management
ruleManager.name: Name
ruleManager.importHint: Paste a JSON array of rules exported from this screen (or edited by hand). Rows are matched and updated by their id.
ruleManager.jsonHint: Edit conditions and any other field here; applied when you leave this box.

supplier.noLinks: No materials linked to this supplier yet.

factoryProfile.exampleOnly: Example only — replace with factory data

optimizer.needCandidates: Select at least one candidate material.
optimizer.desktopOnly: The Advanced Optimizer runs in the desktop app (it needs the bundled Python solver).
optimizer.infeasible: No combination of the selected candidates satisfies every constraint.
optimizer.mixedIntegerNote: This solve included at least one conditional constraint, so sensitivity (shadow prices) is not available for it.
optimizer.provenanceNote: Advanced Optimizer run {{runId}}. Candidate only — requires chemist review.
optimizer.feasibleWithPenalties: Feasible, but {{count}} soft constraint(s) had to be relaxed.

scenario.heading: Scenarios
scenario.requiresChemistReview: Structural starting point only — requires chemist review, never an approved recipe.
scenario.extrasNote: From the loaded scenario/profile (no editor here yet): {{composition}} composition, {{ratio}} ratio, {{property}} property-target constraint(s).

substitution.title: Replace material
substitution.filterNoBlocking: No blocking compatibility or safety findings
substitution.noCandidates: No candidates match the current filters.
substitution.provenanceNote: Substitution run {{runId}}. Candidate only — requires chemist review.

system.heading: Multi-material system substitution
system.needMultipleLines: Select at least one additional line above to enable system substitution.
system.proposalsGenerated: {{count}} candidate system(s) generated. Click "Evaluate through optimizer" to score them.

trials.heading: Laboratory Trials
trials.selectPrompt: Select a trial to view its execution record.
trials.batchVariancePartial: {{count}} material(s) not yet weighed — partial total shown
trials.correctiveActionNeedsVersion: This project has no saved version yet — save a version before creating a draft from a corrective action.

stability.heading: Stability Studies
stability.needTitleAndSku: A title and a packaging SKU code are required.
stability.selectPrompt: Select a study to view its samples and results.

approval.heading: Approval Readiness
approval.noVersion: Save a version before it can be approved.

blockers.missingCostSnapshot: The configured policy requires a cost snapshot for this version, and none exists yet.

approval.hasActiveOrCompletedStudy: Has an active or completed study
approval.requireRegulatoryDossier: Require a regulatory dossier for each evaluated jurisdiction
approval.requireDossierReadyForReview: Require the dossier to be ready for review
approval.requireDossierReviewComplete: Require an approved dossier review for the current revision
approval.requireNoMissingMandatoryDossierEvidence: Require no missing mandatory dossier evidence
approval.requireNoExpiredMandatoryDossierEvidence: Require no expired mandatory dossier evidence
approval.requireAllRequiredJurisdictionDossiers: Require a dossier for every target market, not just the primary one
approval.roleNotAuthorized: This role cannot grant the requested status.
approval.scopeNoneSelected: Nothing selected — this policy will not match any version until you select at least one.
approval.changeReasonRequired: A reason is required to save this change.
approval.comparisonNoProcess: Process instructions are recorded on trials/studies, not on the formula version itself, so they are not part of this comparison.

attachments.replaceReason: Replaced via the finalized-record replacement workflow.

applicability.heading: Test applicability
applicability.manualInclusionNeedsReviewerAndReason: A reviewer identity and reason are required to manually include an excluded test.
applicability.currentDefinitionsDiffer: Current test definitions differ from what this study's protocol captured — comparison only, the original protocol is unchanged.

resultHistory.heading: Result history
resultHistory.noRetests: No retests recorded for this result.

regulatory.heading: Regulatory Engine (Kenya/EAC)
regulatory.noFamilyMatch: This project's product family could not be resolved from the catalog — classification defaults to human review.
regulatory.noFindings: No findings — click Evaluate to run the regulatory rule set against this formula.
regulatory.importHint: Paste a JSON array of regulatory rules exported from this screen, or edited by hand. Imported rules are always marked "imported, not verified", never silently promoted to verified.
regulatory.invalidShape: Each rule needs at least an id, code, jurisdiction and ruleType.
regulatory.changeReasonRequired: A reason is required to edit a regulatory rule.
regulatory.jsonHint: Full rule as JSON — jurisdiction, ruleType, productCategories, conditions, requirement text and every required-element list live here.
regulatory.noRules: No regulatory rules for this jurisdiction yet.
regulatory.reviewNeedsReviewerAndNotes: A reviewer name and notes are required to record a regulatory review.
regulatory.noReviews: No regulatory reviews recorded yet for this jurisdiction.
regulatory.notLegalAdvice: Every rule here is a structural placeholder pending confirmation by a qualified regulatory reviewer — nothing in this screen is legal advice or a compliance guarantee.
regulatory.workingDraftNotice: No formula version is selected — a review or evidence confirmation can only be recorded against a saved formula version, never the current working draft.
regulatory.needVersionForConfirmation: Select a saved formula version before confirming a requirement.
regulatory.needVersionForReview: Select a saved formula version before recording a review.

dossierMatch.no_dossier: No dossier yet for this version/jurisdiction/packaging SKU.
dossierMatch.wrong_formula_version: A dossier exists for this project but a different formula version.
dossierMatch.wrong_packaging_sku: A dossier exists for this project but a different packaging SKU.
dossierMatch.jurisdiction_not_covered: A dossier exists for this project but does not cover this jurisdiction.

regulatory.rejectVerificationReasonPrompt: Reason for rejecting this rule's verification:
regulatory.supersedeReasonPrompt: Reason this rule is being superseded:
regulatory.unauthorizedRoleHint: Only a regulatory, quality or administrator role may perform this action.
regulatory.declareEquivalenceHeading: Reuse a review from another version
regulatory.equivalenceSummary: Version {{target}} may reuse the review recorded for version {{source}}

dossier.heading: Regulatory Dossiers
dossier.emptyState: No regulatory dossiers yet for this project.
dossier.driftBanner: This dossier's frozen requirements have drifted from the currently active rule set — see History for details. Nothing here changes automatically.
dossier.immutableNotice: Immutable — create a new revision to continue working on this dossier.
dossier.neverMergedNotice: Each jurisdiction's requirements and readiness are shown separately — never merged into a single answer.
dossier.excludeJustificationPrompt: Justification for excluding this applicable requirement:
dossier.manuallyAddedReason: Manually added by an authorized reviewer.
dossier.suggestedEvidence: Suggested by matching evidence type and scope: {{list}}
dossier.unauthorizedRoleHint: Only a regulatory, quality or administrator role may perform this action.
dossier.submissionTrackingNotice: Internal tracking only — this does not submit anything to a government or authority portal.
dossier.requirementDrift: Requirement drift vs. currently active rules
dossier.noDrift: No drift detected — this dossier's frozen requirements match the currently active rule set.
dossier.needSavedVersion: A dossier must be created against a real, saved formula version — not the current working draft.
dossier.importHint: Paste a JSON array or CSV of evidence metadata ({{headers}}), or upload an Excel file. Imported rows are always added as draft, unverified evidence — never silently promoted to verified.
dossier.importUnverifiedNotice: Imported evidence always starts unverified — the import itself is never a verification.
dossier.invalidShape: Each row needs at least a title.
dossier.notLegalAdvice: Compliance-assistance only — this is not a claim of legal compliance, and no document upload or checkbox alone ever makes a product compliant.

reports.heading: Reports
reports.description: Current reportable information, organized by module. Full PDF/DOCX report generation is a later phase — not available yet.
reports.futureExportNote: A dedicated report-generation engine (PDF/DOCX, formatted for print) is planned for a later phase. Today, each module below provides its own JSON/CSV/Excel export where noted.

formula.title: Formula reports
formula.description: Per-version JSON export, from the Formulation workspace's Versions tab.

trial.title: Trial reports
trial.description: Per-trial JSON export, from the Laboratory workspace.

stability.title: Stability reports
stability.description: Study/trend export, from the Stability workspace.

regulatory.title: Regulatory summaries
regulatory.description: Rule and finding export (JSON/CSV/Excel), from the Regulatory workspace.

approval.title: Approval records
approval.description: Decision history and approval snapshots, from the Approval workspace.

audit.title: Audit reports
audit.description: No dedicated audit-log report view yet — per-project decision history is visible in the Approval workspace.

administration.heading: Administration
administration.description: Configuration that shouldn't clutter daily R&D work. Each link below opens the existing screen where that configuration already lives.
administration.noUserManagement: This codebase has no user-management backend yet, so there is no "Users and roles" section here — reviewer roles are chosen per-action in the Regulatory and Approval workspaces.

materials.title: Materials, suppliers, packaging & factory profiles
materials.description: Raw materials, suppliers, packaging components/BOMs and factory cost profiles.

regulatoryRules.title: Regulatory rules
regulatoryRules.description: Rule library, source verification, CSV/Excel import/export.

settings.title: Application settings
settings.description: Theme, locale, updates and other app-wide preferences.
